generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local paper - our city's emergency response time dropped 20% last year because of budget cuts. How can we expect to handle real threats if we can't even protect ourselves from everyday emergencies? Strategic autonomy isn't just about big military stuff, it's about making sure our communities are prepared for anything. #LocalSafetyMatters #StrongerTogether
